'''shakuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabloona|kabloona]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-k-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabloona|kabloona]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shakuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shækizith|shækizith]] || [[word:shækizij|shækizij]] || [[word:shækizish|shækizish]] || [[word:shækizi|shækizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shakukuzuth|shakukuzuth]] || [[word:shakukuzuj|shakukuzuj]] || [[word:shakukuzush|shakukuzush]] || [[word:shakukuzu|shakukuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shakuzuth|shakuzuth]] || [[word:shakuzuj|shakuzuj]] || [[word:shakuzush|shakuzush]] || [[word:shakuzu|shakuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shakufzuth|shakufzuth]] || [[word:shakufzuj|shakufzuj]] || [[word:shakufzush|shakufzush]] || [[word:shakufzuf|shakufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shakuzuthu|shakuzuthu]] || [[word:shakuzuju|shakuzuju]] || [[word:shakuzushu|shakuzushu]] || [[word:shakuzuku|shakuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shakuzuth|shakuzuth]] || [[word:shakuzuj|shakuzuj]] || [[word:shakuzush|shakuzush]] || [[word:shakuzu|shakuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shakuzuthul|shakuzuthul]] || [[word:shakuzujul|shakuzujul]] || [[word:shakuzushul|shakuzushul]] || [[word:shakuzukul|shakuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shakuzuthuthu|shakuzuthuthu]] || [[word:shakuzujuju|shakuzujuju]] || [[word:shakuzushushu|shakuzushushu]] || [[word:shakuzuku|shakuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shakuzuthun|shakuzuthun]] || [[word:shakuzujun|shakuzujun]] || [[word:shakuzushun|shakuzushun]] || [[word:shakuzukun|shakuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shakuzuthuoro|shakuzuthuoro]] || [[word:shakuzujuoro|shakuzujuoro]] || [[word:shakuzushuoro|shakuzushuoro]] || [[word:shakuzukuoro|shakuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
